name_cn:
MIUMIU BEAU Tote
Cognac
Full of high-end atmosphere, the cognac brown tone is gentle and looks expensive, with a vintage light luxury filter✨
Top-grade calfskin, soft and delicate touch, becoming more textured the more you carry it
Classic and clean bowling bag silhouette with smooth lines〰️
Extra deep interior capacity, practical for commuting, business trips, and daily outings, balancing utility and aesthetics✅
🔍Size:34*24*10cm
📌Model:5BB117M1300
